text:
ハロウィンの魔女・マジカル★シエラが
ぽわっと参上！　いけない子たちを
ふしぎな魔法でこらしめちゃいます☆

マジカル★シエラちゃんったら
ちゃんと決め台詞まで考えてたんだね！
ふふっ、楽しくな

Spooky★Xiera, mistress of All Hallows'
Eve, is now on the scene! Ready to cast spells
on all the naughty little boys and girls!

Listen to her, she sounds like she just popped
right out of a comic book! Hee hee. I can
already tell this is going to be fun!
